reviews.comment:
Baños regulares, atención playeros de 10, atención del bar/kiosco mala, con mala cara, mala predisposición, es la 1ra vez que me pasa en un ACA (soy socio), es más en ninguna estación servicio me ha pasado

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were okay, the service at the gas station was excellent, but the service at the bar/kiosk was bad—they were unfriendly and unwilling. This is the first time this has happened to me at an ACA (I'm a member), and it's never happened to me at any other service station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlaDlUUWtRRRAB
